function.name: video_stm32_dcmi_set_fmt

bug.description: watchdog timer not serviced on a long-running code path causing unexpected reset

prompt:
There is a watchdog timer not serviced on a long-running code path causing unexpected reset downstream of function video_stm32_dcmi_set_fmt in the drivers/video subsystem.
The function is located at drivers/video/video_stm32_dcmi.c:198.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
